title: Register
paragraph1: Welcome to CuidaTuAgua. By registering and using this application, you agree to the appropriate use of the platform and the information provided.
paragraph2: The user agrees to provide truthful information during the registration process, including their personal data, email, and information about the associated home.
paragraph3: CuidaTuAgua may display information related to tracking, consumption, and the water status of the registered home for consultation, monitoring, and management purposes by the user.
paragraph4: The application will protect the user's personal information in accordance with applicable data processing policies. However, the user is responsible for keeping their access credentials.
paragraph5: Improper use of the platform, falsity in the registered information, or any attempt to affect the system's operation may result in access restrictions.
paragraph6: By accepting these terms and conditions, the user authorizes the processing of their data for the proper functioning of the application and acknowledges having read and understood this information.

success.title: Registration successful
success.message: Your account has been created successfully. You can now log in.
